entries.description:
War Machines, Midas Merge, Paradise Paws, and Time Blast.
Gameplay feature development in C# and Unity3D, LiveOps systems, Golang and Typescript backend, and internal tooling with AI (Claude, Gemini, Cursor) for mobile games at global scale.

Proposed and architected the company's new game platform in Unity3D as Tech Lead.
Owned architecture planning, Unity3D / C# frontend development, and PHP (Laravel) / Python backend.

Master's degree with emphasis on Computer Graphics and Image Processing.
Thesis: Assisted Segmentation in High-Resolution Images. CAPES-funded fellowship for academic performance.

Bingo All Stars, Ambra All Stars, and Flash Link developed in C++ and OpenGL.
Grew from junior to mid-level engineer during this period.

Educational Technology Center at UFABC.
Development of educational games and applications. B.Sc. in Science & Technology + Computer Science completed in 2017.
